description: Use this API to change the value of a real constant (CON) of the 2-winding transformer device model of a specified branch. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = change_cct2wtdmod_con(ibus, jbus, id, model, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_cct2wtdmod_con(ibus, jbus, id, model, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: From bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Con number to change (j is relative to the start of the block of cons assigned to this model, e,g., 1 for first con(k), 2 for con(k+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New con value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: no CCT table entry for the model.
model names do not match - model is aaa not xxx.
no CONs used in the model.
CON number outside of the CON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
